transcript.clean_text: Showtime at the tour of Catalonia Wood ramco Avenue poll find that solitary second to deny Primos ruglich the title still two days to come of course but this surely The Crucible of action to decide the title 176.6 kilometers looping out from back past tortosa before returning to town once again after crossing the river and heading for the ultimate test some say the queen stage of this year's race lopart well the final interview spent would announce the great climb had a couple of incarnations of a breakaway early on Ethan hater had gone off up the road along with guillotau was hunting mountains points and zabu Gourmet Oh My Town went back to the Packers game and the other Brave Riders pushed on out front enough mountains points presumably for my town how to give himself a chance anyway in the king of the mountains competition three from Kern farmer were up the road I must cater from Cairo rail azamendi from us galtel and the pace being set down in The Valleys by sudel quickstep working of course once again for ramco Avenue Nepal trying to tire out the pack but it was largely flat lands and it was Zach bogame of team Jayco alula who pushed on to detonate the break well he got himself a bit of a margin but the Gap back to the Peloton was started to close when he was finally collected it was barring Victorious working for Michael Lander that took the chase on so little Quick Step though never far from the front being joined by UA team Emirates to try and punish potentially yomo visma where was chicconi we kept asking ourselves towards the back of this pack but as the inclines started to pick up Evan Paul went for it tried to shake off roglitch could not do so max Salah was the first to Bridge Over Lander struggling to get onto his back wheel where was Almeida we were asking ourselves and where was chicconi also there ever napole and roglitch locked together meanwhile Almeida was being nursed by Adam Yates and would ultimately try and bridge over to the three up front chicone finding himself in the company of Adam Yates and saying farewell to them was our maida pushing past rigbo to Iran who was having a good day likewise Michael Woods and of course Michael Lander well the radio call came up to those out front for Solaire to wait up for Almeida he was to join great effort by the young Portuguese and battling for a place on that Podium occupied of course by chicone who was struggling be able to offer up this group and would they be allowed to take the day it is of course Mark solaire's home area and they were in softening up mode but it was the young Portuguese that went for it he went on the attack with less than a kilometer to go chasing him down instinctively Remco evinopol and sharing the duties with Primos Rockledge who came to join the fun ultimately was down to the two men who really have defined the race are made up just distanced and then surely it had to be Remco evinopol 300 meters to go he launched but on his back wheel was Primos roglich Never Say Die Primos heading rather uncomfortably on the inside of every single corner just making sure that Remco did not have full belief in his capabilities in the drive for the line start of the day level on time don't forget roglitch positionally with the advantage and he extended that hugely here in the last 50 meters he gained at six seconds over Eva Nepal factoring the bonuses as well groglich controls this race by a margin of 10 seconds a spectacular day in Catalonia one to behold really and absolutely the fact that Primos roglich is well and truly back to his absolute best if you didn't know it after watching Tyranno adriatico then you certainly know it now and so does everybody including Remco Eva Nepal a major in third place today ahead of Mark saleh's teammate rigoberto Iran darling the clock back matinees from group armor as well with a very very good finish but it is roglitch that controls this race with two stages to go and buy a margin of 10 seconds Armada nudges onto the podium looks like that is secure for the young Portuguese fine ride by him chicone dropping down the order to eighth place and so to tomorrow morning's delay 183.2 kilometers most of the lumps in the middle of the day begging a breakaway surely but also you can be certain the Prima Strawbridge will be absolutely on the wheel of Remco Eva Nepal chances remain but they're running out for anyone to challenge Primos roglitch the very best I've tried and not managed it yet so we're two days remaining in Catalunya roglich is in charge will he make it home keep it here to find out foreign
